title: Microtek International South Asia Partners is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Microtek International South Asia Partners is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Microtek International South Asia Partners has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Lucknow office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Microtek International South Asia Partners:
Microtek International South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Microtek International South Asia Partners!
